summary: Completed comprehensive testing of XAC CRM WhatsApp multi-session integration. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All UI tests passed - verified WhatsApp activation in Edit User modal, WhatsApp status badges on consultants, WhatsApp buttons on lead cards (Kanban & Table views), and WhatsApp Send modal with template selector.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 500 response
fixed.fix: Added settings.pop('_id', None) to exclude ObjectId from response

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp service (port 3001) is running correctly with Baileys multi-session support
WhatsApp Integration section correctly placed in Edit User modal for consultants/assistants only
WhatsApp status badges showing on User Management list for consultants
WhatsApp buttons visible on lead cards in both Kanban and Table views
WhatsApp Send modal includes template selector and message input
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_WhatsAppLead and TEST_WhatsApp Template for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp service runs on port 3001 internally. QR scanning requires physical phone so actual WhatsApp connection cannot be tested - but all API responses and UI rendering verified. The consultant user Joanthan (69cbf97c38323e0e80748fb0) can be used for WhatsApp session testing. Fixed ObjectId serialization bug in /api/settings endpoint.

features_verified.settings_user_management_tab: PASS - Shows team members with WhatsApp status badges
features_verified.edit_consultant_modal_whatsapp_section: PASS - WhatsApp Integration section at bottom with Activate button
features_verified.whatsapp_status_badge: PASS - Shows 'No WA' for unconnected consultants
features_verified.integrations_tab_instructions: PASS - Points to User Management for WhatsApp activation
features_verified.leads_kanban_whatsapp_button: PASS - Green WhatsApp button on lead cards
features_verified.leads_table_whatsapp_button: PASS - WhatsApp button in actions column
features_verified.whatsapp_send_modal: PASS - Opens with template selector and message input
features_verified.api_whatsapp_send: PASS - Creates message log (fails without active session as expected)
features_verified.api_whatsapp_qr_user_id: PASS - Returns qrCode null when no session
